name: pearcup-world-cup
description: World Cup bracket pools, watch parties, multilingual QVAC commentary, and P2P soccer minigames for Pear.

scripts.test: node --test app/core.test.js app/adapters.test.js app/runtime-config.test.js app/runtime-settings.test.js app/storage-sim.test.js app/worker-sim.test.js app/worker-client.test.js app/worker-bridge-protocol.test.js app/pear-worker.test.js app/worker-runtime.test.js app/settlement-receipts.test.js app/settlement-service.test.js app/trusted-path-preflight.test.js app/live-readiness.test.js app/live-launch-audit.test.js app/pear-browser-compat.test.js app/transport-sim.test.js app/qvac-referee.test.js app/tether-wdk-bridge.test.js app/sdk-runtime.test.js
scripts.check: npm test && npm run audit:pear-browser -- --require-pass && node --check app/core.js && node --check app/adapters.js && node --check app/runtime-config.js && node --check app/runtime-settings.js && node --check app/storage-sim.js && node --check app/worker-sim.js && node --check app/worker-client.js && node --check app/worker-bridge-protocol.js && node --check app/pear-worker.cjs && node --check app/worker-runtime.js && node --check app/settlement-receipts.js && node --check app/settlement-service.js && node --check app/trusted-path-preflight.js && node --check app/live-readiness.js && node --check app/live-launch-audit.js && node --check app/pear-browser-compat.js && node --check app/transport-sim.js && node --check app/qvac-referee.js && node --check app/tether-wdk-bridge.js && node --check app/sdk-runtime.js && node --check app/app.js && node --check scripts/serve.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-sdk.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-worker-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-trusted-path.mjs && node --check scripts/live-readiness.mjs && node --check scripts/live-config.mjs && node --check scripts/live-launch-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/pear-browser-compat.mjs
